title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Anna University South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Anna University South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Anna University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Anna University South Asia Partners:
Anna University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University South Asia Partners!
